# batch

Run multiple commands

## Usage

```bash
agent-device batch [--steps <json> | --steps-file <path>]
```

## Session Requirement

Creates or manages sessions internally.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--steps <json>`: Batch: JSON array of steps
- `--steps-file <path>`: Batch: read steps JSON from file
- `--on-error stop`: Batch: stop when a step fails
- `--max-steps <n>`: Batch: maximum number of allowed steps
- `--out <path>`: Output path

## Platform Coverage

_Capability checks are not defined for this command in `command-schema.ts`._
